name: Rhode Island School of Design (RISD)
department: Fine Arts / Graphic Design / Illustration
departmentZh: 纯艺术 / 平面设计 / 插画
requirements: Portfolio: 12–20 works. Artist statement (500 words). 3 letters of recommendation. Transcripts. SAT/ACT optional. Portfolio must demonstrate observational drawing ability and creative range.

name: Parsons School of Design
department: Fine Arts / Fashion / Illustration / Product Design
departmentZh: 纯艺术 / 时装 / 插画 / 产品设计
requirements: Parsons Challenge (creative project). Portfolio: 8–12 works. Personal essay. Transcripts. No standardized test required. The Parsons Challenge assesses creative thinking and problem-solving.

name: School of Visual Arts (SVA)
department: Fine Arts / Illustration / Photography / Animation
departmentZh: 纯艺术 / 插画 / 摄影 / 动画
requirements: Portfolio: 15–20 works relevant to chosen major. Personal statement. Transcripts. No entrance exam. Work should reflect individual artistic voice and technical skill.

name: Yale School of Art
department: MFA: Painting / Sculpture / Graphic Design / Photography
departmentZh: 绘画 / 雕塑 / 平面设计 / 摄影
requirements: Graduate program only. Portfolio: 20 images. Statement of purpose (500 words). 3 letters of recommendation. CV/Resume. GRE not required. Extremely competitive — acceptance rate ~3%.

name: Central Saint Martins (CSM)
department: Fine Art / Fashion / Graphic Communication / Product Design
departmentZh: 纯艺术 / 时装 / 平面传达 / 产品设计
requirements: Portfolio submitted via UAL application. Interview required for shortlisted candidates. Personal statement. English proficiency (IELTS 6.0+). Portfolio must demonstrate research process, not just final outcomes.

name: Royal College of Art (RCA)
department: MFA: Painting / Sculpture / Photography / Animation
departmentZh: 绘画 / 雕塑 / 摄影 / 动画
requirements: Graduate program. Portfolio: 20 works + process documentation. Personal statement (600 words). 2 academic references. IELTS 6.5+. Shortlisted candidates attend an interview day in London.

name: Goldsmiths, University of London
nameZh: 伦敦大学金史密斯学院
department: Fine Art / Illustration / Design / Art Practice
departmentZh: 纯艺术 / 插画 / 设计 / 艺术实践
requirements: Portfolio review. Personal statement. Interview (online or in-person). IELTS 6.5+. Known for conceptual and critical art practice. Portfolio should reflect independent thinking over technical polish.

name: Accademia di Belle Arti di Roma
department: Painting / Sculpture / Art & New Technologies
departmentZh: 绘画 / 雕塑 / 艺术与新技术
requirements: Entrance exam (esame di ammissione) held in September. Portfolio presentation. Italian language proficiency (B1 recommended). Diploma superiore required. EU and non-EU application procedures differ.

name: Accademia di Belle Arti di Brera
department: Painting / Sculpture / New Media Languages
departmentZh: 绘画 / 雕塑 / 新媒体语言
requirements: Entrance exam in July–September. Portfolio (physical or digital). Italian proficiency required. One of Italy's most prestigious fine art academies. High international student enrollment.

name: École des Beaux-Arts de Paris (ENSBA)
nameZh: 巴黎国立高等美术学院
department: Fine Arts / Printmaking / Sculpture
departmentZh: 纯艺术 / 版画 / 雕塑
requirements: Competitive entrance exam. Portfolio review. Interview. French proficiency required. One of France's Grande Écoles. Tuition is free for EU students. Very limited international places.

name: Pratt Institute
department: Fine Arts / Graphic Design / Architecture / Fashion
departmentZh: 纯艺术 / 平面设计 / 建筑 / 时装
requirements: Portfolio: 10–15 pieces via SlideRoom. Personal essay (250–500 words). Test-optional. 1 letter of recommendation recommended. Include 3–5 works from direct observation of 3D objects. No AI-generated images permitted.

name: California Institute of the Arts (CalArts)
department: Fine Arts / Animation / Film / Music / Theater / Dance
departmentZh: 纯艺术 / 动画 / 电影 / 音乐 / 戏剧 / 舞蹈
requirements: Portfolio or audition required (varies by school). Personal statement. Transcripts. Each school within CalArts has specific criteria. Known for experimental and avant-garde practice. Very competitive.

name: Savannah College of Art and Design (SCAD)
nameZh: 萨凡纳艺术与设计学院
department: Animation / Fashion / Graphic Design / Illustration / Film / Photography
departmentZh: 动画 / 时装 / 平面设计 / 插画 / 电影 / 摄影
requirements: Portfolio recommended but not required for admission. Personal essay. Transcripts. SAT/ACT optional. SCAD accepts rolling admissions. Portfolio strengthens scholarship consideration significantly.

name: Art Center College of Design
department: Graphic Design / Illustration / Product Design / Photography / Film
departmentZh: 平面设计 / 插画 / 产品设计 / 摄影 / 电影
requirements: Portfolio: 15 pieces showing creative range and technical skill. Personal statement. Transcripts. 2 letters of recommendation. Known for industry-focused design education. Very rigorous portfolio standards.

name: Maryland Institute College of Art (MICA)
department: Fine Arts / Graphic Design / Illustration / Photography / Animation
departmentZh: 纯艺术 / 平面设计 / 插画 / 摄影 / 动画
requirements: Portfolio: 12–20 works. Personal statement. Transcripts. Test-optional. Strong merit scholarship program — strong portfolio can yield significant aid. Rolling admissions available.

name: University of the Arts London (UAL)
department: Fine Art / Fashion / Graphic Design / Photography / Film
departmentZh: 纯艺术 / 时装 / 平面设计 / 摄影 / 电影
requirements: Portfolio via UAL application portal. Personal statement (4,000 characters). UCAS application. IELTS 6.0+. Interview for shortlisted candidates. Includes Chelsea, Camberwell, LCF, LCC, CSM, and Wimbledon colleges.

name: Konstfack University of Arts
nameZh: 瑞典国立艺术与设计学院
department: Fine Arts / Graphic Design / Textile / Ceramics / Industrial Design
departmentZh: 纯艺术 / 平面设计 / 纺织 / 陶瓷 / 工业设计
requirements: Portfolio: 10–20 works. Motivation letter. Swedish or English proficiency. Entrance examination may be required. Tuition-free for EU/EEA students. Non-EU students pay approx. SEK 135,000/year.

name: Domus Academy
department: Fashion Design / Product Design / Interior / Brand Design
departmentZh: 时装设计 / 产品设计 / 室内设计 / 品牌设计
requirements: Portfolio: 10–15 works. Motivation letter. English proficiency (IELTS 5.5+). Interview. Ranked top 3% worldwide by QS 2026. Postgraduate/Master programs only. Strong industry connections in Milan.

name: Australian National University (ANU) School of Art
nameZh: 澳大利亚国立大学艺术学院
department: Painting / Sculpture / Photography / Printmaking / Ceramics
departmentZh: 绘画 / 雕塑 / 摄影 / 版画 / 陶瓷
requirements: Academic transcripts. Personal statement. No portfolio required for undergraduate admission (unique among top art schools). English proficiency: IELTS 6.5+. Only Australian institution in QS Art & Design top 150.

name: Nanyang Technological University (NTU) School of Art
nameZh: 南洋理工大学艺术学院
department: Animation / Communication Design / Photographic Practice / Transversal Design
departmentZh: 动画 / 传播设计 / 摄影实践 / 跨学科设计
requirements: Visual portfolio required for all BFA programs. Good mathematics grade. English proficiency. Interview for shortlisted candidates. Specialisations in animation, game art, cinematic arts, communication design.
